query:
SELECT 
  j.id, j.title, j.status, j.completedScenes, j.totalScenes, j.finalVideoUrl,
  j.errorMessage, j.updatedAt,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating' THEN 1 END) as generating,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 450002
GROUP BY j.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT 
  j.id, j.title, j.status, j.completedScenes, j.totalScenes, j.finalVideoUrl,
  j.errorMessage, j.updatedAt,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating' THEN 1 END) as generating,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 450002
GROUP BY j.id;
